This local module replaces github.com/tailscale/web-client-prebuilt for the
PocketBackup Android tsnet helper.

The Android helper does not compile Tailscale's web client path, but Go module
tidying still retains that dependency because Tailscale's module includes
non-Android packages. This source-only stub keeps the module graph resolvable
without downloading or embedding the upstream prebuilt web bundle.
